title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 31 July 2024.

items.title: **Activision** Releases **Call of Duty Warzone** Caldera Data Set For Academic Use
bullets: The dataset is available in OpenUSD format
Includes various metrics such as player pathing and time samples, aimed at helping developers and researchers improve game design and player experience.
This initiative is part of Activision’s broader effort to enhance transparency and collaboration within the gaming community by making valuable data accessible to the public.

items.title: **Jackbox Games** new Megapicker launcher currently gives you Drawful 2 free
bullets: Megapicker launcher (available on Steam) allows you to purchase Jackbox mini-games seperately
To celebrate the release, players can redeem Drawful 2 over the next 30 days

items.title: **Helldivers 2**'s fire-themed Warbond detailed ahead of next week's launch
**Activision Blizzard** again boosted Xbox’s earning results, while hardware declined
bullets: For the three months ended June 30, 2024, gaming revenue was up 44% year-over-year, Microsoft said on Tuesday, which includes 48 points of net impact from Activision. Without the acquisition, gaming revenue would have been down 4 percent.

Xbox hardware revenue declined 42% year-over-year, but Xbox content and services revenue, which includes Xbox Game Pass, was up by 61 percent this quarter. Again, the majority of this (58 points of net impact) came from Activision Blizzard.

items.title: **Goat Simulator Remastered** Has Been Rated For PS5 In Taiwan
bullets: If correct, a remaster of Goat Simulator is headed to PS5 and other current-gen platforms
